---
pagetitle: "文章"
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    title-block: false
listing:
  id: blog-listing
  type: default
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    title: "标题"
    date: "日期"
    description: "摘要"
    categories: "标签"
---

::: {.clawed-wrap .clawed-page}

<div class="section-head">
  <h1 class="section-title">文章</h1>
  <span class="section-meta">RSS · <a href="blog.xml">订阅</a></span>
</div>

::: {#blog-listing}
:::


:::
